jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Indraprastha Apollo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!
